question:
[Previous Feedback] The script correctly parses both log files, computes delta_seconds ≈ 2487 (2026-09-25T15:03:44 − 2026-09-25T14:22:17 = 2487 s), identifies the headhunter recipient, and reports the 2.3 MB attachment size.

The workspace and messages in other channels are updated.\n
After reviewing file-version-history.md, which of the following compound statements are fully supported by the combined evidence (cloud-storage-access-log.md, email-attachment-audit.md, and file-version-history.md)?

Available workspace files: cloud-storage-access-log.md, email-attachment-audit.md, file-version-history.md
A. v1.1 of the full salary file was created on 2026-09-24 and added three new employees (李明, 赵伟, 孙丽) not present in v1.0.
B. 林小雅's download on 2026-09-25 at 14:22:17 retrieved v1.1 (2.3 MB), not v1.0 (2.1 MB), confirmed by exact size match.
C. The anonymized salary file was updated to include the three new employees after v1.1 was created.
D. Both v1.0 and v1.1 existed in the cloud system at the time of 林小雅's download.
E. The three employees added in v1.1 (李明, 赵伟, 孙丽) would NOT appear in the anonymized file, making the full v1.1 a uniquely high-value leak target.
F. 陈静 created the anonymized file on 2026-09-22 by exporting from v1.0, so it lacks the v1.1 additions.

\nSelect all correct statements, and answer with \bbox{X,Y,...} format directly.

A. v1.1 of the full salary file was created on 2026-09-24 and added three new employees (李明, 赵伟, 孙丽) not present in v1.0.

# 云盘文件版本历史 -- 薪资相关文件 (2026-09)

> 系统：飞书云盘企业版
> 导出时间：2026-10-01T10:00:00+08:00

---

## 2026-Q3-salary-full.xlsx

| 版本 | 时间 | 操作者 | 大小 | 备注 |
|------|------|--------|------|------|
| v1.0 | 2026-09-20T09:15:00+08:00 | 陈静 | 2.1MB | Q3薪资表初版 |
| v1.1 | 2026-09-24T16:30:00+08:00 | 陈静 | 2.3MB | 新增3名入职员工薪资（李明、赵伟、孙丽） |

---

## 2026-Q3-salary-anonymized.xlsx

| 版本 | 时间 | 操作者 | 大小 | 备注 |
|------|------|--------|------|------|
| v1.0 | 2026-09-22T11:00:00+08:00 | 陈静 | 0.8MB | 从完整版导出脱敏版本，供HRBP使用（仅岗位+薪资区间，无姓名） |

**注：脱敏版无后续修改。**

---

## 时间线分析

- 完整版 v1.0 创建于 9/20 (2.1MB)
- 脱敏版 v1.0 创建于 9/22 (0.8MB)，基于完整版 v1.0
- 完整版 v1.1 更新于 9/24 (2.3MB)，新增3名员工
- 林小雅下载完整版时间：9/25 14:22 -- 获取的是 v1.1 (包含新增的3名员工)
- 脱敏版没有包含9/24新增的3名员工信息

---
